title: HackMatrix 2025
description: A 72-hour national-level hackathon open to all engineering students. Theme: AI for Social Good. Prizes worth ₹1,50,000!

title: Arduino & IoT Bootcamp
description: Hands-on 3-day bootcamp on Arduino, sensors, and building IoT prototypes from scratch. Open to all branches.

title: Career Connect – Industry Talk
description: Panel discussion with engineers from ISRO, Infosys & TCS. Learn about career paths in technology.

title: PCB Design Workshop
description: A full-day workshop on KiCad PCB design, soldering techniques, and hardware prototyping basics.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Introduction to ethical hacking, network security, CTF challenges, and OWASP top 10.

title: IEEE Day 2024
description: Annual IEEE Day celebration with paper presentations, quiz competitions, and cultural events.
